candidate_definition_hints.text: Microsoft Security DevOps for GitHub Actions.

Microsoft Security DevOps (MSDO) is a command line application which integrates static analysis tools into the development cycle. MSDO installs, configures and runs the latest versions of static analysis tools (including, but not limited to, SDL/security and compliance tools). M…
